cups-error: Error sending the job to CUPS.
document-not-printable: The indicated template is not a printable document.
document-pdf-error: The PDF of the document could not be generated.
duplicate-name: There is already a printer with the name '%name%'.
file-outside-allowed: The file is outside the allowed location.
invalid-queue: The CUPS queue name is invalid: %queue%
no-free-actions: All actions have an assigned printer
no-printer-actions: There are no actions assigned to this printer
queue-not-found: The '%queue%' queue does not exist in CUPS.
temp-write-error: The temporary file could not be created.
test-error: The test page could not be sent.
